title: Bridge Base - Open App
meta_description: bridge base via the docs-listed Superbridge route for ETH and supported tokens between Ethereum and Base; verify the domain before connecting.
hero_h2: Move Assets Between Ethereum and Base
hero_lead: bridge base opens the docs-listed Superbridge route for moving ETH and supported tokens between Ethereum mainnet and Base with a clear wallet-first handoff.
what_is: Bridge Base points users to the current Ethereum-to-Base transfer routes for ETH and supported assets. Base's bridge documentation says the old bridge.base.org interface is deprecated and lists Superbridge and Brid.gg as Ethereum-to-Base options.

how.d: Use the app button and verify the destination domain is superbridge.app before connecting a wallet.
Connect the wallet that holds the asset on Ethereum mainnet, then review the selected source and destination networks.
Select ETH or another supported token, confirm the recipient address, and check any wallet approvals carefully.
Submit the transaction, then follow the bridge status in the app and verify the Base-side transaction when it lands.

points.p: Base documentation lists Superbridge as an option for moving ETH and supported assets from Ethereum mainnet to Base.
The intended flow is Ethereum mainnet to Base mainnet; testnet users should use the separate Base Sepolia route linked from Base docs.
Check the app domain, token address, wallet prompt, and Base transaction on BaseScan before treating a transfer as complete.

faq.a: Bridge Base is a routing page for users who want to move assets between Ethereum and Base through a docs-listed bridge app; it is not operated by Coinbase or Base.

faq.q: Does Bridge Base still use bridge.base.org?
faq.a: No. Base documentation says the bridge on bridge.base.org has been deprecated and now points users toward Superchain bridge options.

faq.q: What can I move with Bridge Base?
faq.a: The Ethereum-to-Base route supports ETH and other assets supported by the selected bridge app. Always confirm token details in the app before signing.

faq.q: How do I check a Bridge Base transaction?
faq.a: Use the bridge app status, your wallet history, and BaseScan for the Base-side transaction record.
No. It is educational routing content; review bridge terms, smart contract risk, wallet prompts, and the destination domain before signing.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify superbridge.app and Base docs before signing; educational only, not financial advice.
